findings.title: Untranslated English CTA on Japanese route
findings.detail: /ja renders primary action button with accessible name 'Get Started' in English while sibling button uses Japanese ('ライブデモを見る'). Page lang=ja but CTA name is en — hurts JA screen-reader experience.
evidence: main > button "ライブデモを見る"

findings.title: Primary CTA count cannot be confirmed from a11y tree alone
findings.detail: Two buttons above fold; tree doesn't expose CSS classes to verify single primary.
evidence: main > button "ライブデモを見る"

findings.title: Tap target / contrast not in tree dump
findings.detail: WCAG 2.1 AA contrast (>=4.5:1) and 44x44 tap targets cannot be evaluated from accessibility tree alone — needs axe-core / bbox assertions.
evidence: a11y_tree_excerpt contains role/name only, no bbox or color data

findings.title: Primary CTA 'Get Started' button background changed from gradient to flat solid
findings.detail: Above-fold CTA changed from Hinomaru Red gradient (#C41E3A → #9F0F1A) in baseline to flat solid #C41E3D in current. Hue within ~1, no layout shift, no contrast loss > 0.1.

findings.title: All non-CTA regions pixel-identical to baseline
findings.detail: Outside the primary CTA, the 1440x900 capture is pixel-identical. No layout shift, no font regression, no broken images.
evidence: full-frame diff outside CTA bounding box

findings.title: Hardcoded English CTA on /ja route ('Get Started')
findings.detail: Hardcoded in components/marketing/HomeHero.tsx line 47. No t() wrapper, no ja key. Violates 'no untranslated English on /ja' acceptance criterion.

findings.title: Missing i18n key 'home.cta.primary' in ja/marketing.json
findings.detail: Catalog lacks JA translation for primary CTA. Add 'home.cta.primary': 'はじめる' (or brand-approved equivalent) plus en/marketing.json entry.
evidence: no key found for 'Get Started' in ja/marketing.json

findings.title: Trust signals 'verified' / 'Vault contract' untranslated
findings.detail: EN qualifiers on JA page: 'NIST FIPS 204 verified · NIST FIPS 205 verified · Sepolia Vault contract'. Localize to '検証済み' / 'Vault コントラクト'.
evidence: NIST FIPS 204 verified · NIST FIPS 205 verified · Sepolia Vault contract

findings.title: Top navigation: confirm items use t()
findings.detail: 'プロダクト テクノロジー ドキュメント GitHub' — verify all except 'GitHub' come from locales/ja/marketing.json.
evidence: プロダクト テクノロジー ドキュメント GitHub

findings.title: Footer items: confirm via t()
findings.detail: 'プライバシーポリシー · 利用規約 · X / Twitter' — verify via footer.privacy / footer.terms keys.
evidence: プライバシーポリシー · 利用規約 · X / Twitter

findings.title: Subtitle '+' between FIPS numbers — JA typography nit
findings.detail: 'NIST FIPS 204 + 205 デュアル署名で…'. JA convention prefers '・' or '／'.
evidence: NIST FIPS 204 + 205 デュアル署名で、ECDSA を超えた次の標準へ。

findings.title: Baseline recorded
findings.detail: First run for home-ja desktop; current metrics recorded as baseline.
